name: kuira-wp-ship
description: Release + distribution for WordPress plugins in Claude Code — semantic version bump and dist zip, GitHub Actions CI with wordpress.org SVN auto-deploy, WordPress.org readme.txt generation, i18n/.pot readiness, and a hooks-reference (HOOKS.md) generator.
author: Mohammad Limon Mia

recommends.kuira-wp-core: the core build skills this pairs with
